feature_tested: Guest Ordering Platform + Guest360 + Housekeeping + MinibarIRD modules
summary: Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). All 4 modules have fully working APIs. Frontend: Guest Ordering Platform (/guest-order) works end-to-end with auth, menu, cart, and order confirmation. Enterprise panels (Housekeeping, MinibarIRD with Guest Platform tab, Guest 360) all load correctly from sidebar.

endpoints: GET /api/housekeeping/dashboard - Returns 65 rooms with KPIs (occupied, dirty, clean, inspected, ooo, vip, staff)
GET /api/housekeeping/rooms - Returns room list with filters
GET /api/guest360/search?q=Guest - Returns search results across all data sources
GET /api/guest360/profile/301 - Returns unified profile with spa/concierge/dining/minibar/ird history
GET /api/ird/dashboard - Returns KPIs (active_orders, total_orders, ird_revenue, minibar_revenue, menu_items)
GET /api/ird/menu - Returns categorized menu (food, beverage, amenity, sundry)
GET /api/ird/minibar/412 - Returns minibar inventory with charges
POST /api/ird/minibar/consume - Charges minibar item to room
POST /api/guest-order/auth - Authenticates with room_number + last_name, returns session token
GET /api/guest-order/menu - Returns time-period-filtered menu (hides sold-out items)
POST /api/guest-order/order - Places order, decrements counts, creates sold-out alerts
GET /api/guest-order/manager/menu - Returns all items with counts and sold_out status
PUT /api/guest-order/manager/reset-count/{item_id} - Resets count and clears alert

verified_elements: Guest Ordering auth screen loads at /guest-order with room number and last name inputs
Guest Ordering auth submit button works
Guest Ordering menu loads after auth with current time period (Breakfast)
Guest Ordering shows category tabs: Food & Dining (5), Beverages (3), Sundries (3), Amenities (3)
Guest Ordering menu items display with emoji, name, description, price, prep time
Guest Ordering Add button adds item to cart
Guest Ordering View Order button appears in cart footer
Guest Ordering cart drawer opens with item list, quantities, special instructions
Guest Ordering Place Order button works
Guest Ordering confirmation screen shows order ID, total, estimated delivery
Guest Ordering Order More button returns to menu
Housekeeping panel loads from sidebar (Engineering & Facilities > Housekeeping)
Housekeeping shows KPIs: Total 65, Occupied 33, Dirty 14, Clean 9, Inspected 9, OOO 0, VIP 9, Staff 5
Housekeeping shows room grid with status badges (OCCUPIED, CLEAN, DIRTY, INSPECTED, CHECKOUT)
Housekeeping has floor filters (All Floors, Floor 2-6) and status filters
Housekeeping Mark Clean button on dirty rooms
MinibarIRD panel loads from sidebar (Events & Catering > IRD & Minibar)
MinibarIRD Dashboard tab shows KPIs: Active Orders 2, Total Orders 2, IRD Revenue $48, Minibar Revenue $6
MinibarIRD has 5 tabs: Dashboard, IRD Menu, Minibar, Orders, Guest Platform
MinibarIRD Guest Platform tab shows QR code linking to /guest-order
MinibarIRD Guest Platform shows Copy Link button
MinibarIRD Guest Platform shows Menu Periods (Breakfast, All Day, Overnight) with adjustable time inputs
MinibarIRD Guest Platform shows Guest Menu Items table (31 items) with counts and status
Guest 360 panel loads from sidebar (Dashboard & Overview > Guest 360 Profile)
Guest 360 shows search input with placeholder 'Search by name, email, or room number...'

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 modules have complete backend APIs with proper seed data
Guest Ordering Platform: Full e2e flow working - auth, menu, cart, order, confirmation
Time-period-aware menu correctly shows Breakfast items during breakfast hours (05:30-11:00)
Available count tracking works - items with counts show remaining, sold-out items hidden from guests
Manager dashboard in MinibarIRD has full control over periods, counts, and alerts
QR code correctly links to /guest-order for guest-facing ordering
Housekeeping room board shows all 65 rooms across floors 2-6 with proper status tracking
Guest 360 unified profile aggregates data from spa, concierge, dining, minibar, IRD sources
test_credentials: Guest ordering: Room 412, Last name: Smith (any name works for demo)
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds: 65 housekeeping rooms (floors 2-6), 31 guest menu items, 20 IRD menu items, 14 minibar items, 3 menu periods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested Guest Ordering Platform and 3 enterprise modules. All backend APIs 100% working. Guest Ordering at /guest-order is a standalone page with room+lastname auth, time-period menu, cart, and order flow. Enterprise panels accessible via sidebar: Housekeeping under Engineering & Facilities, IRD & Minibar under Events & Catering, Guest 360 under Dashboard & Overview. Menu periods: Breakfast 05:30-11:00, All Day 11:01-23:00, Overnight 23:00-05:30.

features: Available count tracking (hides sold-out from guests)
Cart with quantities and special instructions

housekeeping.frontend: 100% working - panel loads with room grid
features: KPIs (total, occupied, dirty, clean, inspected, ooo, vip, staff)
Guest Platform tab with QR code
Guest search across all data sources
